data.title: 国际服3.5周年特别登陆奖励
data.summary: [3.5th Anniversary Special Login Event] A special log-in bonus event is here to celebrate the 3.5th
data.body:
[3.5th Anniversary Special Login Event]

A special log-in bonus event is here to celebrate the 3.5th anniversary!
Don't miss out on opportunity to get up to 1,200 Pyroxenes and the Furniture for Hoshino (Armed)!

🗓️Event Period: 1/23 (Thu) After maintenance ~ 2/22 (Sat) 1:59 PM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=2719326

#BlueArchive
